name: ai-governance-legal
description: Triages proposed AI use cases against your registry, runs impact assessments across the regimes in scope, reviews vendor AI terms for training-on-data and liability gaps, and keeps your AI policy current with practice.

interface.shortDescription: Triages proposed AI use cases against your registry, runs impact assessments across the regimes in scope, reviews vendor AI terms for train…
interface.longDescription: Triages proposed AI use cases against your registry, runs impact assessments across the regimes in scope, reviews vendor AI terms for training-on-data and liability gaps, and keeps your AI policy current with practice. Migrated for Codex as a repo-scoped plugin. V1 supports local files and pasted text by default; remote connectors must be configured separately.
defaultPrompt: Use AI Governance Legal with local files or pasted text.
